title: EXTENSION AGREEMENT
text_head: EXTENSION AGREEMENT dated as of January 15, 2025, by and among CenterPoint Energy, Inc., as Borrower, the Extending Banks party hereto, and Citibank, N.A., as Administrative Agent. Reference is made to the Credit Agreement dated as of May 20, 2021. The parties agree to extend the Maturity Date and amend the Revolving Credit Termination Date.
